summary: Final validation of AutoML Master 7-point fixes completed successfully. All features tested and working: History dedup (1 entry after 2 training runs), Decision Tree modal with explanation, Export buttons with toast notifications, SHAP and LIME plain-English explanations.

issues:
Minor React warning: validateDOMNesting -
cannot appear as descendant of

in Badge component. Non-blocking.

passed_tests: HISTORY DEDUP: Trained same dataset (Customer Churn) twice with Auto mode -> only 1 history entry exists (timestamp updated from 1:14:44 PM to 1:15:36 PM). DEDUP WORKING CORRECTLY.
DECISION TREE MODAL: Opens with tree visualization showing decision nodes and leaf nodes. 'How to read this tree' explanation visible.
EXPORT CSV: Download CSV button triggers toast notification 'Download started: analysis_for_google_sheets_xxx.csv'
EXPORT TO GOOGLE SHEETS: Button triggers toast notification with download filename
SHARE ANALYSIS: Button triggers toast 'Share link copied to clipboard!' with URL displayed (https://automl-validation.preview.emergentagent.com/?snapshot=xxx)

SHAP PLAIN-ENGLISH: 'What does this mean?' section explains feature importance - 'The model relies most heavily on tenure_months and payment_method_Electronic check to make its predictions about churned.'

LIME PLAIN-ENGLISH: 'Why this prediction?' section explains individual prediction - 'For this specific record, the model predicted 1.000 for churned. The biggest factors supporting this prediction: monthly_charges (+0.353) and payment_method_Electronic check (+0.232).'
Login flow works correctly with test@automl.com / Test1234!
Customer Churn dataset loads (1000 rows x 15 cols)
Model training with Auto mode completes successfully
Explainability tab shows SHAP Analysis, LIME Explanation, and Feature Insights tabs
critical_code_review_comments: Line 1290-1296: computeFingerprint correctly uses dsName|target|modelKeys|evalMode (NO scores) - VERIFIED WORKING
Line 2509-2513: Leaf node explanation added for simple trees when tree.leaf && !tree.left && !tree.right - CODE PRESENT
History dedup working: Same fingerprint results in update instead of new entry
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user. History was clean (0 entries) at start of testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7-point fixes verified working: (1) History dedup - fingerprint now uses dsName|target|modelKeys|evalMode without scores, (2) Decision Tree modal shows tree with explanation, (3) Export CSV shows toast, (4) Export to Sheets shows toast, (5) Share Analysis shows toast with URL, (6) SHAP plain-English explanation in 'What does this mean?' section, (7) LIME plain-English explanation in 'Why this prediction?' section. The leaf node explanation code is present at line 2509-2513 but wasn't triggered because the Customer Churn dataset produces a complex tree, not a simple leaf node.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: History dedup was creating multiple entries due to score values in fingerprint
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The fingerprint computation included test metric scores which varied between training runs even with same dataset/target/algorithm
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Line 1290-1296: computeFingerprint now uses only dsName|target|modelKeys|evalMode (NO scores)
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Trained Customer Churn dataset twice with Auto mode. First training created 1 entry at 1:14:44 PM. Second training updated the same entry to 1:15:36 PM. Only 1 entry exists in history - DEDUP WORKING.
